What We Offer

Our Services

Seven specialist physiotherapy services — personalized to your condition, delivered with expertise and care.

Spinal PhysiotherapySports Injury RehabNeurological TherapyOrthopedic TherapyPain ManagementPost-Surgery RehabHome Physiotherapy
Specialized care for your spine

Spinal Physiotherapy

Comprehensive treatment for the full range of spinal conditions. We restore alignment, improve flexibility and build core strength for long-term spinal health.

Techniques Used

Manual therapy, traction, McKenzie technique, core stabilization

Conditions We Treat

  • Slip Disc
  • Sciatica
  • Cervical Spondylosis
  • Lower Back Pain
  • Scoliosis
  • Postural Disorders

Key Benefits

  • Reduces nerve compression pain
  • Restores spinal alignment
  • Improves posture & flexibility
  • Prevents recurrence
Book Spinal Physiotherapy — ₹500
Back to peak performance

Sports Injury Rehab

Whether a professional athlete or weekend warrior, our sports rehabilitation heals your injury, restores full function and returns you to activity safely.

Techniques Used

Sports massage, kinesio taping, strength & conditioning, proprioceptive training

Conditions We Treat

  • Muscle Strains
  • Ligament Tears
  • Rotator Cuff
  • Knee & Ankle Injuries
  • Stress Fractures
  • Tennis Elbow

Key Benefits

  • Faster return to sport
  • Sport-specific conditioning
  • Injury prevention
  • Performance enhancement
Book Sports Injury Rehab — ₹500
Rebuilding neural pathways

Neurological Therapy

Targeted neurological rehabilitation for disorders of the brain, spinal cord and nerves — helping patients regain movement, independence and quality of life.

Techniques Used

Bobath technique, PNF, balance retraining, gait training

Conditions We Treat

  • Stroke & Hemiplegia
  • Parkinson's Disease
  • Multiple Sclerosis
  • Spinal Cord Injury
  • Nerve Injuries
  • Brain Injury

Key Benefits

  • Improved mobility & coordination
  • Reduced spasticity
  • Enhanced daily function
  • Greater independence
Book Neurological Therapy — ₹500
Bone & joint restoration

Orthopedic Therapy

Expert care for bones, joints, muscles and soft tissues — addressing both acute injuries and chronic musculoskeletal conditions.

Techniques Used

Joint mobilization, dry needling, therapeutic exercises, hot/cold therapy

Conditions We Treat

  • Osteoarthritis
  • Frozen Shoulder
  • Knee Pain
  • Hip Pain
  • Plantar Fasciitis
  • Carpal Tunnel

Key Benefits

  • Reduced joint pain
  • Improved range of motion
  • Stronger supporting muscles
  • Delayed joint degeneration
Book Orthopedic Therapy — ₹500
Long-lasting chronic pain relief

Pain Management

Multimodal pain management using advanced techniques to interrupt pain cycles, restore function and help you reclaim an active life.

Techniques Used

TENS, ultrasound therapy, manual therapy, pain neuroeducation

Conditions We Treat

  • Chronic Back Pain
  • Fibromyalgia
  • Myofascial Pain
  • Chronic Neck Pain
  • Headaches
  • CRPS

Key Benefits

  • Significant pain reduction
  • Improved sleep quality
  • Restored daily function
  • Reduced medication
Book Pain Management — ₹500
Accelerate surgical recovery

Post-Surgery Rehab

Proper rehabilitation determines your surgical outcome. Our post-operative protocols minimize complications and achieve full functional recovery.

Techniques Used

Progressive loading, scar management, functional rehabilitation

Conditions We Treat

  • Knee Replacement
  • Hip Replacement
  • Shoulder Surgery
  • Spine Surgery
  • ACL Repair
  • Rotator Cuff Repair

Key Benefits

  • Faster healing
  • Scar tissue prevention
  • Earlier return to function
  • Fewer complications
Book Post-Surgery Rehab — ₹500
Expert care at your doorstep

Home Physiotherapy

Professional physiotherapy delivered at home for those who cannot visit the clinic. Same quality care, maximum convenience.

Techniques Used

All core physiotherapy modalities adapted for home use

Conditions We Treat

  • Elderly Mobility
  • Post-Discharge Care
  • Severe Disability
  • Post-Surgical Recovery
  • Neurological Conditions
  • Palliative Care

Key Benefits

  • No travel required
  • Familiar environment
  • Family involvement
  • Flexible scheduling
Book Home Physiotherapy — ₹500

Not Sure Which Service?

Our physiotherapists will assess your condition and recommend the best treatment plan.
